Title: Shou dao ren

Directors: Li Chen

Introduction
    The film tells the touching experience of Wang Jicai and his wife who stayed on Kaishan Island in Jiangsu Province for 32 years defending the island and defending the country making the island their home.

Filming locations: Kaishan Island, Guanyun County, Lianyungang, China
Production companies: Xing Fu Lan Hai Ying Shi
Hebei Radio, Film and Television Culture
